settings.editor: Puppies are cute, little and adorable. At the same time, they are most vulnerable to illnesses like parvo and distemper around 4 to 12 weeks of age. They need special care in this duration.
Our Puppy Program is a series of monthly visits and checkup, which helps your pet combat this span with ease and immunity.
35 minutes with the Doctor and Technician.
Pamoate Wormer, initial dose of Heartguard Plus and Frontline Plus.
3 month supply of Frontline, 6 month supply of Heartguard.
